query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A grayscale photograph of a vast, still body of water under dense fog. A bright circular sun sits in the upper right portion of the frame, producing a narrow vertical reflection on the calm water below. Several small dark forms, likely birds, rest on the water's surface in the middle distance. The horizon is obscured by haze, blending the sky and water into a continuous field with minimal visible detail.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A muted, washed-out grayscale photograph depicting a vast body of water under heavy fog, rendered with flat lighting and low contrast that crushes tonal separation. A pale, diffused sun glows weakly in the upper right, casting a faint reflection on the still water where small dark birds float. The oppressive monochrome palette and absence of shadows collapse depth and dimension, evoking an atmosphere of melancholy and quiet dread.
